name: ecommerce-image-generator
description: Generate ecommerce product main images and detail-page long images from a product reference image.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a product image into polished ecommerce main image and detail-page sets.
interface.longDescription: A reusable Codex workflow for generating professional ecommerce main image sets and 3-5 detail-page long images from an uploaded product reference image, including product analysis, selling-point copy, prompt planning, visual QA, and demo-ready output packaging.
interface.defaultPrompt: 根据这张产品图，生成 5 张商品主图和 5 套电商详情页长图。
